truthSpec.title: Log Aggregator
truthSpec.overview: Build a log aggregator that processes newline-delimited JSON logs, aggregates by service and level, calculates error rates, and handles timezone normalization.

requirements.text: Accept newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON) input — each line is one JSON log entry
Each log entry has: service, level (info/warn/error/debug), message, timestamp (ISO 8601 with timezone)
Aggregate logs by service + level combination
Calculate error rate per service: (error count / total count for that service) × 100, as a percentage
Normalize all timestamps to UTC before aggregation (inputs may have various timezone offsets)
Handle malformed lines gracefully — skip them and count them in a malformedCount field

edgeCases: All lines malformed → only malformedCount populated
Timestamps with +05:30, -08:00, Z offsets should all normalize to UTC
truthSpec.testSummary: 5 tests covering: basic aggregation, error rate calculation, timezone normalization, malformed line handling, and empty input.

aiBrief.title: Log Aggregator
aiBrief.overview: Build a log aggregator that processes JSON log arrays, aggregates by service and level, and calculates statistics.
requirements: Accept a JSON array of log entries
Each log entry has: service, level (info/warn/error/debug), message, timestamp
Aggregate logs by service + level combination
Assume all timestamps are already in UTC
Return: aggregation map, error counts per service, total log count

flaws.description: Brief says JSON array input; truth says newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON)
Brief assumes UTC timestamps; truth requires timezone normalization from various offsets
Brief says error count; truth says error rate as percentage. Also omits malformedCount field.
